session.user:
Run these commands sequentially and report all results:
1. `ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/impl_reset.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_impl_reset.py tests/unit/cli/commands/test_implement.py` 2. `ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/impl_reset.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_impl_reset.py tests/unit/cli/commands/test_implement.py` 3. `ty check src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/impl_reset.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/group.py` 4. `pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_impl_reset.py tests/unit/cli/commands/test_implement.py -v`
Report all outputs.
